message:
fix(harness): remove redundant double-ref in blob pattern match

Simplify `&**b == &[...]` to `**b == [...]` in the Blob opcode test's
validate closure — the extra borrow was unnecessary since slice
comparison already derefs both sides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
